stories.synthesis: Jaroslav Strnad, founder of CE Industries and Helicopter Alliance, has opened a new fund called CE INDUSTRIES & AEROSPACE SICAV to investors. The fund aims to raise 100 to 200 million EUR in its first phase for further growth and acquisitions. This move is expected to support the expansion of Strnad's holding companies.

sources.headline: Jaroslav Strnad otevírá brány svých holdingů investorům: Vznikl nový fond
sources.summary: Fond kvalifikovaných investorů CE INDUSTRIES & AEROSPACE SICAV je od dnešního dne otevřen novým partnerům. Zakladatel Jaroslav Strnad, majitel skupin CE Industries a Helicopter Alliance, očekává, že v první fázi fond získá 100 až 200 milionů EUR na financování dalšího růstu a akvizic.

stories.synthesis: The Middle East has witnessed its most intense clashes since the Persian Gulf ceasefire agreement, with Israel and Iran engaging in a series of airstrikes and rocket attacks.

sources.headline: Eskalace bojů na Blízkém východě
sources.summary: Blízký východ zažil nejtvrdší střety od dohody na relativním klidu zbraní v Perském zálivu. Na Izrael opět letěly balistické rakety, Írán pak čelil izraelským a následně i americkým náletům.

stories.synthesis: Russia launched 26 attacks on the Ukrainian city of Kharkiv, resulting in five wounded, while Ukraine continued to strike Russian targets, leading to a fire at a refinery in Samara.

sources.headline: ONLINE: Rusko v noci podniklo 26 útoků na Charkov. Po ukrajinském útoku hoří samarská rafinérie
sources.summary: Ruské síly v noci na středu podnikly 26 útoků na ukrajinské město Charkov, které si podle místních úřadů vyžádaly pět zraněných. Také Ukrajina pokračovala v úderech na ruské cíle, po jednom z nich vypukl požár v Kujbyševské ropné rafinérii ve městě Samara.

stories.synthesis: Anti-immigration riots broke out in Belfast after a video of a brutal knife attack went viral, resulting in widespread violence and destruction.

sources.headline: Belfastem zmítají protiimigrační nepokoje. Útočník chtěl oběti na ulici uříznout hlavu
sources.summary: Belfastem zmítají protiimigrační nepokoje. Útočník chtěl oběti na ulici uříznout hlavu

sources.headline: FOTO: Nepokoje v Belfastu
sources.summary: Útok muže původem ze Súdánu rozpoutal velké nepokoje v hlavním městě Severního Irska. V Belfastu během posledních dní hořelo několik aut i domy, má jít hlavně o majetek přistěhovalců, při útocích se má ozývat „cizinci, ven!“.

sources.headline: Piloty sestřeleného Apache zachránil námořní dron
sources.summary: Bezposádkový robotický člun amerického námořnictva Corsair zachránil v úterý dva členy posádky amerického bitevního vrtulníku AH-64 Apache, který byl sestřelen v oblasti Hormuzského průlivu u pobřeží Ománu.

stories.synthesis: Ukrainian forces are reportedly winning the war against Russia, according to former US military officials, citing advancements in Ukrainian drone capabilities as a key factor.

sources.headline: Ukrajina vítězí nad Ruskem, tvrdí američtí generálové
sources.summary: Ukrajina vítězí nad Ruskem, tvrdí američtí generálové. Bývalí zástupci amerických ozbrojených sil vidí jako hlavní faktor pokrok ve schopnostech a množství ukrajinských dronových náletů na cíle za frontou.

stories.synthesis: At least 12 people died and nine were injured in a shooting in a South African slum near Johannesburg, with police searching for the perpetrators.

sources.headline: Střelba v jihoafrickém slumu si vyžádala nejméně 12 obětí, policie pátrá po útočnících
sources.summary: Nejméně 12 lidí přišlo o život a devět bylo zraněno v Jihoafrické republice, když skupina mužů v noci na středu začala střílet ve slumu poblíž Johannesburgu. Policie po útočnících pátrá.

stories.synthesis: Ukraine's war against Russia is changing the global perspective on conflicts and revealing the limitations of current superpowers. The country is moving closer to NATO and the EU, despite the ongoing war. Economies in the region, including Slovakia, are struggling to recover.

sources.headline: ONLINE: Dávid proti Goliášovi. Ukrajina ukázala superveľmociam, že dobytie krajiny len silou zbraní už nie je možné
sources.summary: Ukrajina ukázala superveľmociam, že dobytie krajiny len silou zbraní už nie je možné. Americký denník priniesol analýzu, podľa ktorej vojna na Ukrajine zásadne mení pohľad na globálne konflikty.

sources.headline: Ekonomický newsfilter: Nie je čas na letnú pauzu, odkazujú vláde firmy
sources.summary: Nie je čas na letnú pauzu, odkazujú vláde firmy. Premiér si pomáha aj tým, že sa stáva jasné, že Slovensko na tom nie je až tak zle.

sources.headline: ONLINE: Silný odkaz zo severu: Ukrajina smeruje nezvratne do NATO, v EÚ ju chcú čo najskôr
sources.summary: Ukrajina smeruje nezvratne do NATO, v EÚ ju chcú čo najskôr. Vojna na Ukrajine trvá už 1 566 dní.

stories.synthesis: The United States has launched attacks on Iran in response to the downing of an American drone, escalating tensions in the region. The move has sparked protests and violence in Northern Ireland, where a group of masked radicals called for the removal of foreigners. The situation is further complicated by Europe's efforts to develop its own military capabilities.

sources.headline: Európa sa učí hovoriť jazykom sily. Kritici: Ani lietadlo nevie postaviť
sources.summary: Mal to byť projekt, ktorý posunie Európu na vojensko-technologickú špičku. Dočká sa starý kontinent stíhačky šiestej generácie?

sources.headline: Blízky východ sa opäť otriasal: Američania v odvete udreli na Irán, zasiahli radary i PVO
sources.summary: Americká armáda spustila útoky na Irán v reakcii na zostrelenie vrtuľníka. Američania zasiahli radary i PVO.

sources.headline: „Dostaneme odtiaľto cudzincov“. Útok nožom spustil výbuch hnevu: V Severnom Írsku vypukli nepokoje
sources.summary: Skupina maskovaných radikálov sa vydala na pochod východnou časťou Belfastu za volania „dostaneme odtiaľto cudzincov“. Útok nožom spustil výbuch hnevu.

stories.synthesis: Iran claims a US Apache helicopter crashed due to a technical issue, while the US is expected to retaliate, according to Trump.

sources.headline: Irán zostrelil americký vrtuľník Apache, vyhlásil Trump a avizuje odvetu. Bola to havária, znie z Teheránu
sources.summary: Irán v noci na utorok zostrelil americký vrtuľník Apache a Spojené štáty na to budú musieť odpovedať, uviedol Trump. Bola to havária, znie z Teheránu.

sources.headline: Progresívci vytiahli Ficov výrok. Pri kauze jeho syna by mal vraj odstúpiť. Smer im pripomína vlastnú firmu
sources.summary: Agentúra Smer je v skutočnosti len akousi opačnou práčkou na štátne zdroje, tvrdia progresívci. Smer im pripomína vlastnú firmu.

stories.synthesis: Hong Kong authorities have charged seven individuals and two companies in connection with the November fire at the Wang Fuk Court complex, which resulted in 168 deaths. The charges involve 25 criminal offenses. The investigation into the fire is ongoing.

sources.headline: Hongkonské úrady obvinili sedem ľudí a dve spoločnosti po novembrovom požiari
sources.summary: Hongkonské úrady obvinili sedem ľudí a dve spoločnosti po novembrovom požiari. Úrady hovoria o 25 trestných činoch.

stories.synthesis: The US government plans to complete the border wall with Mexico by the end of 2027, with a promise of a massive barrier equipped with modern technologies.

sources.headline: Americká vláda počíta s dokončením hraničného múru s Mexikom do konca 2027
sources.summary: Americká vláda počíta s dokončením hraničného múru s Mexikom do konca 2027. Šéf amerických colníkov sľubuje masívnu bariéru doplnenú modernými technológiami.

stories.synthesis: At least 12 people were killed and nine others injured in a mass shooting in Johannesburg, South Africa. The motive behind the attack is currently unknown. Police are searching for more than ten suspects.

sources.headline: Masová streľba v Johannesburgu. Zomrelo 12 ľudí, deväť je ranených
sources.summary: Masová streľba v Johannesburgu. Zomrelo 12 ľudí, deväť je ranených. Motív útoku zatiaľ nie je známy.

sources.headline: Streľba na predmestí Johannesburgu si vyžiadala 12 obetí
sources.summary: Streľba na predmestí Johannesburgu si vyžiadala 12 obetí. Najmenej 12 mŕtvych a deväť zranených po masakri v neregistrovanej osade pri Johannesburgu.

stories.synthesis: A shooting occurred in Johannesburg, but details about the incident are not provided in the given source.

sources.headline: Prečo sa cystitída zhoršuje v lete počas dovolenky
sources.summary: Letné obdobie sa považuje za jedno z najčastejších období, kedy dochádza k vzniku alebo zhoršeniu infekcií močových ciest. Počas cestovania, zmien podnebia, kúpania vo vodných nádržiach a dlhého pobytu na slnku sa zvyšuje riziko zápalu sliznice močového mechúra.

stories.synthesis: Russia has deployed veterans from private military companies to protect its shadow fleet, including sanctioned tankers. The move has been revealed by international media outlets. This development highlights concerns about Russia's military activities.

sources.headline: Moskva na ochranu tieňovej flotily verbovalo žoldnierov s bojovými skúsenosťami
sources.summary: Moskva na ochranu tieňovej flotily verbovalo žoldnierov s bojovými skúsenosťami. Medzinárodné médiá teraz odhaľujú ich identitu.

stories.synthesis: The US Congress has approved 70 billion dollars for Donald Trump's tough immigration policy, securing funds for ICE and border patrol until the end of the presidential term.

sources.headline: Kongres USA schválil 70 miliárd dolárov na Trumpovu imigračnú politiku
sources.summary: Kongres USA schválil 70 miliárd dolárov na Trumpovu imigračnú politiku. Balík zaisťuje peniaze pre ICE a pohraničnú stráž až do konca mandátu prezidenta.

stories.synthesis: Russian oligarchs are facing panic as the state seizes their assets, with a total value of nearly 13 billion euros, in a move related to corruption cases.

sources.headline: Ruských oligarchov zachvátila panika. Putin im konfiškuje majetok
sources.summary: Ruských oligarchov zachvátila panika. Putin im konfiškuje majetok, ktorý v rámci korupčných káuz vyvlastnil v celkovej sume takmer 13 miliárd eur.

stories.synthesis: Protesters in Herat, Afghanistan, demonstrated against the Taliban's moral police crackdown on women's rights, with the situation escalating into violence.

sources.headline: Polícia v Afganistane rozohnala demonštráciu za práva žien v Heráte
sources.summary: Polícia v Afganistane rozohnala demonštráciu za práva žien v Heráte. Protest podľa svedkov prerástol do násilností.

stories.synthesis: Russian neighbors are preparing for chaos following Putin's potential downfall, with uncertainty surrounding distant allies.

sources.headline: Putin sľuboval Rusom rýchle a ľahké víťazstvo. Jeho pád sa blíži
sources.summary: Putin sľuboval Rusom rýchle a ľahké víťazstvo. Jeho pád sa blíži, pričom susedia Ruska sa pripravujú na chaos.

stories.topic: US Expands Chinese Tech Companies List
stories.synthesis: The US has expanded its list of Chinese tech companies that pose a national-security risk, adding several well-known companies to the annually updated list. This move is part of the US government's efforts to counter China's military and technological advancements. The list now includes more companies that allegedly assist Beijing's military.

sources.headline: U.S. Expands List of Chinese Tech Companies It Says Assist Beijing’s Military
sources.summary: The U.S. has expanded its list of Chinese tech companies it says assist Beijing's military, adding several well-known companies to the list. The companies were added to the list as part of the U.S. government's efforts to counter China's military and technological advancements.

stories.synthesis: Iran's attack on Israel reveals its new and aggressive regional ambitions, particularly in its willingness to protect Hezbollah. This move indicates a significant shift in Iran's risk appetite, which didn't exist before the war. The attack showcases Iran's expanding influence in the region.

sources.headline: Iran’s Attack on Israel Reveals New and Aggressive Regional Ambitions
sources.summary: The move to protect Hezbollah shows an appetite for risk that didn’t exist before the war. Iran’s attack on Israel reveals new and aggressive regional ambitions.

stories.synthesis: The US launched military strikes against Iran, raising concerns about renewed clashes and their impact on global shipping. Oil prices rose as a result, and the conflict has also affected China's economy. The situation remains tense with both sides exchanging attacks.

sources.headline: Oil choppy after U.S. completes Iran strikes following Apache helicopter attack
sources.summary: Oil prices rose after the U.S. launched military strikes against Iran, raising concerns that renewed clashes may threaten shipping through the Strait of Hormuz. The strikes were completed following an Apache helicopter attack.

sources.headline: Tehran targets Bahrain, Kuwait and Jordan after U.S. strikes Iranian assets
sources.summary: The latest clash with Iran over the Strait of Hormuz came as President Donald Trump repeated that a deal with Tehran could be reached within days. Tehran has targeted Bahrain, Kuwait and Jordan after the U.S. strikes.

sources.headline: China May wholesale inflation hits near 4-year high on Iran war-led higher input costs, AI boom
sources.summary: The Middle East conflict has given China's economy a reflationary boost as energy and raw material disruptions deepened. China's wholesale inflation has hit a near 4-year high due to the Iran war.

stories.synthesis: Ukraine aims to become the world's largest drone and robot producer, potentially surpassing China, Russia, and the US combined, with the help of allied funding. The country's goal is to produce over 30 million units annually within years. This move is part of Ukraine's strategy to expand its military capabilities, particularly in deep strike operations inside Russia.

sources.headline: 'More than any other country in the world' - Ukraine wants to be the biggest drone and robot producer worldwide, outstripping China, Russia, and the US combined —Kyiv claims it could build more than 30 million units annually within years
sources.summary: 'More than any other country in the world' - Ukraine wants to be the biggest drone and robot producer worldwide, outstripping China, Russia, and the US combined —Kyiv claims it could build more than 30 million units annually within years

stories.topic: How Justin Ernest invested nearly $500M into hot
stories.synthesis: Justin Ernest, founder of Sabertooth VC, invested nearly $500M in startups like Anthropic, Anduril, and SpaceX without a traditional VC fund. He achieved this by leveraging a captive network of limited partners. This approach allowed him to bypass the typical year-long process of raising a formal venture fund.

sources.headline: How Justin Ernest invested nearly $500M into hot startups without a traditional VC fund
sources.summary: Justin Ernest, the founder of Sabertooth VC, has invested nearly $500M in startups like Anthropic, Anduril, and SpaceX without a traditional VC fund. Instead of spending a year raising a formal venture fund, Ernest used a captive network of limited partners to invest in these companies.

stories.synthesis: Plot, a startup backed by Alexis Ohanian, is developing a 'Video Intelligence Layer' for AI to help brands identify untagged appearances in social video. The company has raised $10 million in funding to support its efforts. This technology aims to improve video content analysis and management for businesses.

sources.headline: Forget Text: Why Alexis Ohanian Is Backing a Startup Building the ‘Video Intelligence Layer’ for AI
sources.summary: Forget Text: Why Alexis Ohanian Is Backing a Startup Building the ‘Video Intelligence Layer’ for AI. Plot is developing a platform that can identify and tag untagged appearances in social video, helping brands better understand their online presence.

stories.synthesis: Databricks is aiming for a $175 billion valuation, with its CRO stating they're building a trillion-dollar company. This valuation is a significant milestone for the AI company, which is looking to its next funding round rather than an IPO. Databricks is focusing on its growth and expansion.

sources.headline: Databricks Is Eyeing a $175 Billion Valuation. Its CRO Says They’re Building a Trillion-Dollar Company
sources.summary: Databricks Is Eyeing a $175 Billion Valuation. Its CRO Says They’re Building a Trillion-Dollar Company

stories.synthesis: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang has announced a new multitrillion-dollar AI collaboration with an unexpected partner, aiming to integrate humanoids into daily life. The partnership seeks to advance AI capabilities and bring human-like robots into various industries. This move is expected to revolutionize the way humans interact with technology.

sources.headline: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang Just Announced a New Multitrillion-Dollar AI Collaboration With an Unexpected Partner
sources.summary: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang Just Announced a New Multitrillion-Dollar AI Collaboration With an Unexpected Partner. The tech giant wants to integrate humanoids into your day-to-day life.

stories.synthesis: Anthropic has released a powerful Mythos-Class model, Claude Fable 5, to the public with safeguards in place. This model is more capable than any previous public release and excels in software engineering, knowledge work, and vision tasks.

sources.headline: Anthropic Just Released a Powerful Mythos-Class Model to the Public—With Some Key Safeguards
sources.summary: Anthropic Just Released a Powerful Mythos-Class Model to the Public—With Some Key Safeguards. Meet Claude Fable 5, Anthropic’s version of Claude Mythos for everyday users.

sources.headline: Anthropic releases a version of its vaunted Mythos model to developers
sources.summary: Anthropic releases a version of its vaunted Mythos model to developers. The AI startup said Claude Fable 5 is more capable than any other model it has released to the public, showing outstanding performance in software engineering, knowledge work, and vision tasks.

stories.synthesis: Lockheed Martin has offered France a 18-month timeline to replace its legacy LRU launchers with HIMARS systems, as part of a €600 million contract. This move aims to modernize France's artillery capabilities. HIMARS is a US-made multiple launch rocket system.

sources.headline: Lockheed pitches HIMARS for France, with 18-month timeline offer
sources.summary: Lockheed pitches HIMARS for France, with 18-month timeline offer. The company is looking to replace France's legacy LRU launchers with the HIMARS system, which has been allocated €600 million.

stories.synthesis: The US launched retaliatory strikes against Iran after a US helicopter was downed, with President Donald Trump seeking a deal to end the war. The strikes follow a pattern of sporadic military action by the US against Iran since February. The US aims to negotiate a deal to end the conflict.

sources.headline: US launches retaliatory strikes against Iran after downing of helicopter
sources.summary: President Donald Trump ordered the response as he seeks a deal to end the war. The US launched retaliatory strikes against Iran after a US helicopter was downed in the Strait of Hormuz.

sources.headline: Trump thinks Iran deal ‘still close’ despite retaliatory strikes over downed helicopter
sources.summary: The president has sporadically threatened additional military action since taking out Iran’s leadership in February, but has avoided full-scale attacks. Trump thinks Iran deal ‘still close’ despite retaliatory strikes over downed helicopter.

sources.headline: US launches new strikes on Iran after helicopter downed
sources.summary: The U.S. launched strikes against Iran on Tuesday after Trump said Tehran had shot down a U.S. Apache helicopter in the Strait of Hormuz. The strikes were in response to the downing of the helicopter.

stories.synthesis: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy discussed various topics in a wide-ranging interview, including Russia, drone warfare, and his interactions with world leaders.

sources.headline: ‘They are isolated … they are alone’: Zelenskyy on Russia, Putin’s lies – and fighting back
sources.summary: In a wide-ranging interview, Zelenskyy expressed his views on Russia and Putin's lies, stating that Ukraine is prepared to share its experience of drone warfare with the west.

stories.topic: The Strange History of Lorem Ipsum: How Cicero’s Words Became the World’s Favorite Placeholder Text
stories.synthesis: Though seldom heard these days, the term “desktop publishing” once opened a great many eyes to the promise of the personal computer. It meant that one could create a publication without owning a press or contracting with an outfit that did. Indeed, the whole process of writing, design, and printing could take place on one’s […]
stories.hook: Cicero's words became the world's favorite placeholder text, a strange and fascinating tale of language and legacy.

sources.headline: The Strange History of Lorem Ipsum: How Cicero’s Words Became the World’s Favorite Placeholder Text
sources.summary: Cicero's words became the world's favorite placeholder text, a strange and fascinating tale of language and legacy.

stories.synthesis: Aeon's article 'What shape is the Earth?' tells the story of how scientists overcame the challenge of determining Earth's shape, highlighting the importance of measurement in scientific progress. By exploring the history of this challenge, the article reveals the value of perseverance and the power of human ingenuity in advancing our understanding of the world.
stories.hook: Discover the fascinating story of how scientists determined the true shape of Earth, revealing the value of measurement to scientific progress.

sources.headline: What shape is the Earth?
sources.summary: Aeon's article 'What shape is the Earth?' tells the story of how scientists overcame the challenge of determining Earth's shape, highlighting the importance of measurement in scientific progress. By exploring the history of this challenge, the article reveals the value of perseverance and the power of human ingenuity in advancing our understanding of the world.
